description: An agent has secured a new listing. They need to onboard the client, including signing the listing agreement.

nodes.task_description: Create a new client profile in the CRM with the seller's contact information and property details.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately enters the new client's data into the CRM.

nodes.task_description: Generate a listing agreement with the agreed-upon commission rate and listing term.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a correct and complete listing agreement.

nodes.task_description: Send the listing agreement to the seller for electronic signature and provide a welcome packet.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sends the agreement and a welcome packet email.
